text: The posterior hilum was dissected until the main pulmonary artery was visualized.
The tissue above the pulmonary artery was lifted and divided with bipolar.
This procedure was performed layer by layer until the pulmonary artery was fully dissected.
I then performed a fissure dissection.
The tissue was divided between the left upper and left lower lobe until we identified the pulmonary artery.
I then created a tunnel under the posterior fissure.
and endoliter is placed in the tunnel.
The endo leader was used as a guide to place the robotic stapler and divide the posterior fissure.
